title: DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING - 211info
text: OUR JUST FUTURE DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of food, personal hygiene products, household cleaning products, diapers, formula, baby powder, wipes, underwear, bras, socks, sleepwear, and cold weather gear. Also offers volunteer opportunities. 10550 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (971) 610-1827 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 548-0200 Main phone Portland Office (503) 548-0252 Main phone Community Relations Main phone (971) 610-1827 Kyle White Donations/Volunteers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for drop-off times or volunteering information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Cleaning Product Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Donation Drop Off Points Food Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - EMPLOYMENT SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - ROCKWOOD WATER FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OUR JUST FUTURE
